title: paeonia mascula
intro: Paeonia mascula, also known as the common peony or red peony, is a perennial plant native to Europe and Asia, characterized by its large, showy flowers and medicinal properties. The roots of Paeonia mascula contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antispasmodic properties, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. The health benefits of Paeonia mascula include reducing menstrual cramps, relieving anxiety and insomnia, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Paeonia mascula are typically made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used to alleviate symptoms of PMS, menopause, and other gynecological issues.
